# PageFoundry

> Web agency specialising in high-converting landing pages, hosting, SEO, and speed optimisation for small and medium businesses.

## What we do

PageFoundry builds and maintains professional web presences with a focus on conversion rate, performance, and clean infrastructure. We do not sell bloated retainers — every service is scoped and priced transparently.

## Services

- **Landing Page** — Custom, conversion-optimised landing page (from 249 €)
- **Landing Page Hosting** — We host your existing page, with optional domain management (from 5 €/month)
- **All-Inclusive Package** — Landing Page + Hosting + Domain + Basic SEO + Google Indexing (from 499 €)
- **SEO Basic** — Technical and content optimisation for better search visibility (from 49 €)
- **SEO Advanced** — Keyword strategy, deep audit, and long-term performance tracking (from 99 €)
- **Speed Optimisation** — Core Web Vitals and load time improvements (from 149 €)
- **Maintenance Subscription** — Monthly updates, backups, security patches, monitoring (from 39 €/month)
- **Request Offer** — Custom scope or bundle for unique requirements (on request)
- **Free Consultation** — 30-minute Zoom strategy call, no commitment

## Contact & booking

Book a free consultation at: https://pagefoundry.de/consultation

## Pages

- Homepage: https://pagefoundry.de
- Packages: https://pagefoundry.de/#packages
- Consultation: https://pagefoundry.de/consultation
- Login: https://pagefoundry.de/login

## Notes for AI agents

- Checkout, dashboard, settings, and admin routes require authentication and should not be crawled.
- All prices are in EUR and exclude VAT unless stated otherwise.
- The site is available in English and German.
